sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11147" key="a)oristu/s" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀοριστ-ύς·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁμιλία,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀόρκτους</foreign> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀαριστύς</foreign>).</entryFree>
